content.en:
"If you want to enter the Origin Ancestor World, you must pass through the Hurricane Sea to enter the treasure world in the Origin Ancestor's body, and during this period, there is a very terrifying rule power in the Origin Ancestor's body, once you enter, you will be wiped out by that terrifying rule world, and you must have extremely strong strength to resist that power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And he doesn't have that strength yet.

However, once he cultivated to the sixth balance, even if he didn't reach the strength of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, he wouldn't be too far behind.

At that time, he may be able to ignore the power of the Hurricane Sea, but whether he can survive in the treasure world in the body of the Origin Ancestor, he is not clear, and he can only try.

"The next goal is to raise the cultivation to the sixth balance, and it is best to create a defensive reincarnation supreme supernatural power!"

Ye Tian thought so.

However, this requires him to copy Ao Chen's second reincarnation supreme supernatural power, the reincarnation flow body technique, and after creating this reincarnation supreme supernatural power, he will create a defensive reincarnation supreme supernatural power.

"I'm about to create this reincarnation supreme supernatural power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, he had already created a reincarnation supreme supernatural power, and with experience and understanding, he didn't understand anything like he did at the beginning, so he created it faster.

Sure enough, it was another 10 million years later.

Ye Tian finally created the Reincarnation Flow Body Technique, so that any of his copied bodies could cast this reincarnation supreme supernatural power, but the consumption was larger and the power was less, but it was still the reincarnation supreme supernatural power!

In the following years, Ye Tian consumed all kinds of resources, and his cultivation was gradually improving.

It's just that from the fifth balance to the sixth balance, it takes too many resources and time, and even he is difficult to raise to the limit of the fifth balance.

Thereupon.

He roamed all kinds of treasures in the dark realm of reincarnation, collected various resources, and handed them over to his real body copy body, which was used to improve the cultivation of the real body copy body.

But it can't be broken through in a short period of time, and it takes a long time to improve.

After all, his current combat power can be called invincible among the eight awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlords, which is equivalent to the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords improving their cultivation, which is naturally not easy.

Like those Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have awakened eight times, which one of them is not using the infinite years to improve a little bit of strength, it is naturally impossible to break through quickly!

......

After the 80 million primeval era.

"The resources obtained from the reincarnation dark domain are almost exhausted!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So many resources, many of which were priceless, were all consumed by him.

And his cultivation has still not reached the limit of the fifth balance, which shows how much resources are consumed by taking the fourth path, but his strength is also really strong.

At this point, he was thinking about how to get more resources.

"The resources of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan are definitely a lot, but it is impossible for the Reincarnation Celestial Clan to provide me with unlimited resources!"

Ye Tian knew that he couldn't rely on the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and he had to find a way to get more resources by himself.

Moreover, ordinary resources are of no use to him, and must be incomparably precious resources to be valuable.

And after Ye Tian's continuous inquiry, he finally knew that there was an incomparably precious resource treasure land in the reincarnation dark domain, and the treasures in it were incomparably high, and even to a certain extent, they were even better than the resources bred within the Origin Ancestor.

However, the interior of this treasure land is also very dangerous, and the maximum number of awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords is allowed to enter the Seventh Awakening Upper Realm, and the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords can also enter if they use special means, but their strength will be suppressed a lot, and they will not be able to exert their true strength.

This treasure land is the reincarnation purple abyss of the reincarnation dark domain!

The Reincarnation Purple Abyss is very dangerous, and there are many members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who die in it.

Over time, not many members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor have entered here, and occasionally only some members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who have been trapped in the Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm for a long time will venture into this place, or the members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who are trapped in the limit of the Eight Awakenings want to break through to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, which will suppress the strength to come in and fight for a chance.

Wow!

Entrance to the reincarnation of the purple abyss.

Ye Tian came here, and wisps of purple light spread out from here, forming a purple glow that spanned endless time and space, which was very beautiful.

But such a beautiful picture represents danger, if an ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlord tries to touch it, he will be directly sucked into the Reincarnation Zi Abyss, and he can't get out.

Only the five awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords have the strength to come out, otherwise they will be trapped in the reincarnation purple abyss.

Abrupt.

A group of powerful creatures rushed out of the purple abyss of reincarnation.

However, a terrifying formation force directly killed this group of creatures.

"The creatures of the reincarnation purple abyss can come out, but the reincarnation celestial clan has arranged a formation here, and has also sent a strong person, once a reincarnation purple abyss creature rushes out, it will be directly suppressed. Ye Tian said darkly.

That's when it happened.

A figure appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Ao Chen, you want to go in and reincarnate Zi Yuan???"

What appeared in front of Ye Tian was a Nine-Time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, who had been sitting here.

"I've seen Lord Poison Ancestor, I want to go in and give it a try!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ao Chen, you are the peerless genius of our Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, it is too dangerous to enter here, even if the clan gives you the reincarnation treasure to protect your life, it may not be able to protect you!" Poison Ancestor said.

"Lord Poison Ancestor, I have enough strength to ensure my safety!"

Ye Tian knew very well that if he didn't show a little strength, he wouldn't want to go in at all.

"Strength, you've only awakened five times, what kind of strength can you have?"

Poison Ancestor said in a deep voice.

In desperation, Ye Tian said: "Poison Ancestor, I can burst out with eight awakening combat power!"

"You can show the power of eight awakenings???"

Poison Ancestor naturally didn't believe it.

However, then Ye Tian said that he wanted to show his strength, so he fought with the Poison Ancestor.

Of course, he can't be the opponent of the Poison Ancestor, just to show his strength.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian unleashed the supreme divine power of reincarnation, the Spear of the Ruin Heaven, and hid his strength, only showing the attack power of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who had awakened the Origin Eight times.

Saw.

Poison Ancestor easily blocked Ye Tian's attack with one hand, but he showed an unbelievable look.

"It's really eight awakening combat power!"

This time, he completely believed in Ye Tian's strength.

Moreover, after Ye Tian cast the reincarnation flow body, the speed was extremely fast, coupled with the life-saving thing, as long as such strength did not go deep into the reincarnation purple abyss, there was absolutely no danger to his life.
